name: I missed some work after machine accident—how to get paid?
description: 2/3 wages via TTD benefits after short wait[4].

mainEntity.name: I missed some work after machine accident—how to get paid?

acceptedAnswer.text: 2/3 wages via TTD benefits after short wait[4].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Temporary total disability pays 2/3 wages from day 4-7 typically.** Submit doctor notes proving inability[4]. **Key factors:** Light duty offered reduces pay. **Practical guidance:** Track hours lost; dispute reductions. Applies in Utah/Idaho.
